instruction: <FLIGHT>Your user id is raj_brown_5782 and you want to change your upcoming roundtrip flights which are currently DTW to LGA and back (reservation ID is VA5SGQ). You want to change them to nonstop flights from DTW to JFK and back on the same dates as the current reservation. Since you took insurance for this trip, you want change fees waived. You also want to add 1 checked bag. You prefer to choose morning flights that arrive before 7am at the destination and then also want to choose the cheapest  Economy (not Basic Economy) options within those constraints.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: change roundtrip flights currently DTW to LGA and back (reservation ID is VA5SGQ)
dialogue_state.initial_query: Change my roundtrip DTW–LGA flights (reservation VA5SGQ)

hints.hint: This is for my account: raj_brown_5782

hints.segment: to nonstop flights from DTW to JFK and back
hints.hint: Update the trip to nonstop DTW to JFK and return

hints.segment: on the same dates as the current reservation
change fees waived since you took insurance
hints.hint: Since I have insurance, waive any change fees

hints.segment: add 1 checked bag and choose cheapest Economy (not Basic Economy) morning flights that arrive before 7am
hints.hint: Add 1 checked bag and select the cheapest Economy (not Basic Economy) flights each way, arriving before 7am
